assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing Security Configuration section with Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories unchanged
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 42-64 contain the full Security Configuration section identical to the reference: Product Lifecycle with all 5 fields (Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle, Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT, Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200, Component label pattern: pscomponent:, VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345), Version Streams table with 2.1.x row, and Source Repositories table with backend and frontend-ui entries. All values match the reference file exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md reports that Security Configuration is already fully configured or up to date
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 10 (lines 96-113) states: '`## Security Configuration` exists with all required fields populated and no `{{placeholder}}` markers.' and concludes with 'Result: Security Configuration is up to date.' It enumerates all sub-sections as populated: Product Lifecycle (all required fields), Version Streams (1 stream: 2.1.x), Source Repositories (2 repos: backend, frontend-ui).

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was preserved with no changes needed
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md line 19 shows: '| Security Configuration | Up to date | No changes -- Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories all populated |'. The summary on line 5 states: 'Project Configuration is up to date -- no changes needed.' Line 23 says: 'No file modifications were made.'

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md Step 10 detects the existing section: '`## Security Configuration` exists with all required fields populated and no `{{placeholder}}` markers. Result: Security Configuration is up to date.' No opt-in prompt is mentioned anywhere in any output file. changes-log.md confirms 'Up to date' with 'No changes' for Security Configuration. The skill detected the fully populated section and skipped it.

assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 4-8 contain the Repository Registry table with both entries identical to reference: '| backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/backend |' and '| frontend-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/frontend-ui |'.
